testcase.classname: WorkshopsService should be defined
testcase.name: WorkshopsService should be defined

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService create should create and populate a workshop
testcase.name: WorkshopsService create should create and populate a workshop

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService findAll should return all workshops populated
testcase.name: WorkshopsService findAll should return all workshops populated

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService findOne should return a workshop by id
testcase.name: WorkshopsService findOne should return a workshop by id

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService findOne should throw NotFoundException if workshop not found
testcase.name: WorkshopsService findOne should throw NotFoundException if workshop not found

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService update should update a workshop
testcase.name: WorkshopsService update should update a workshop

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService update should throw NotFoundException if workshop not found
testcase.name: WorkshopsService update should throw NotFoundException if workshop not found

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService remove should delete a workshop
testcase.name: WorkshopsService remove should delete a workshop

testcase.classname: WorkshopsService remove should throw NotFoundException if workshop not found
testcase.name: WorkshopsService remove should throw NotFoundException if workshop not found
